shortDescription: Tense ব্যবহার করার সময় বাংলাভাষীরা যে ভুলগুলো প্রায়ই করে এবং বিশেষ নিয়মগুলো জেনে নাও।

structure.negative: Subject + Correct Auxiliary + not + Verb + Object

rules.title: Auxiliary Verb-এর ভুল ব্যবহার
rules.explanation: বাংলাভাষীরা প্রায়ই auxiliary verb (am, is, are, was, were, do, does, did) ভুলভাবে ব্যবহার করে। নিচের নিয়মগুলো মনে রাখো।
points: ❌ I am go to school. → ✅ I go to school. (am আর go একসাথে হয় না)
❌ I am agree with you. → ✅ I agree with you. (agree এর সাথে am বসে না)
❌ He don't like tea. → ✅ He doesn't like tea. (He/She/It → does not)
❌ She didn't went. → ✅ She didn't go. (did-এর পর base form)
❌ I am not go there. → ✅ I do not go there. / I am not going there.
মনে রাখো: am/is/are/was/were + V-ing (Continuous), have/has/had + V3 (Perfect), do/does/did + V1 (Simple)

examples.english: ❌ I am not know → ✅ I don't know
❌ She is not believe → ✅ She doesn't believe
❌ They are not want → ✅ They don't want
❌ He was not go → ✅ He did not go

rules.title: Subject-Verb Agreement
rules.explanation: Present Indefinite-এ Subject-এর সাথে Verb-এর রূপ মেলানো খুব গুরুত্বপূর্ণ। He/She/It দিয়ে Verb-এর শেষে s/es যোগ হয়।
points: He/She/It/Singular → Verb + s/es ❌ He go → ✅ He goes
I/We/You/They/Plural → Verb (base form) ❌ They goes → ✅ They go
❌ She speak English well. → ✅ She speaks English well.
❌ The boy play cricket. → ✅ The boy plays cricket.
❌ The children plays here. → ✅ The children play here. (children = plural)
Either/Neither/Each/Everyone → Singular verb: Everyone is (not are) here.

examples.english: ❌ He write a letter. → ✅ He writes a letter.
❌ She go to market. → ✅ She goes to market.
❌ The dog run fast. → ✅ The dog runs fast.
❌ My parents likes me. → ✅ My parents like me.

rules.title: Since vs For vs Ago
rules.explanation: Since, For, এবং Ago তিনটিই সময় বোঝায় কিন্তু ব্যবহার ভিন্ন। এদের সঠিক ব্যবহার না জানলে বাক্যের অর্থ বদলে যেতে পারে।
points: Since: নির্দিষ্ট সময়/পয়েন্ট (since 2020, since Monday, since 5 PM, since childhood)
For: সময়ের দৈর্ঘ্য (for 2 hours, for 5 years, for a long time, for a week)
Ago: অতীতে নির্দিষ্ট সময় আগে (2 years ago, 5 minutes ago, a long time ago)
Since/For → Present Perfect বা Present Perfect Continuous দিয়ে ব্যবহার হয়।
Ago → Past Indefinite দিয়ে ব্যবহার হয়।
❌ I am living here since 2020. → ✅ I have been living here since 2020.
❌ I know him for 3 years. → ✅ I have known him for 3 years.

examples.english: I have studied here since 2020. (since + point)
I have studied here for 4 years. (for + duration)
I started studying here 4 years ago. (ago + past)
examples.bangla: আমি ৪ বছর আগে এখানে পড়া শুরু করি।

examples.english: She has been waiting since 10 AM.

rules.title: Conditional Sentences
rules.explanation: Conditional sentence এ 'if' ব্যবহার করে শর্ত প্রকাশ করা হয়। তিন ধরনের conditional আছে এবং প্রতিটির tense নিয়ম আলাদা।
points: Type 0 (General Truth): If + Present Indefinite, Present Indefinite। যেমন: If you heat ice, it melts.
Type 1 (Real Future): If + Present Indefinite, will + V1। যেমন: If it rains, I will stay home.
Type 2 (Unreal Present): If + Past Indefinite, would + V1। যেমন: If I were you, I would go.
Type 3 (Unreal Past): If + Past Perfect, would have + V3। যেমন: If I had known, I would have come.
❌ If I will see him, I will tell him. → ✅ If I see him, I will tell him. (if-এ will হয় না)
❌ If I was you → ✅ If I were you (was না, were বসে)

examples.english: If it rains, I will stay home. (Type 1 - real possibility)
examples.bangla: যদি বৃষ্টি হয়, আমি বাড়িতে থাকব।

examples.english: If I had money, I would buy a car. (Type 2 - unreal present)
examples.bangla: যদি আমার টাকা থাকত, আমি গাড়ি কিনতাম।

examples.english: If I had studied more, I would have passed. (Type 3 - unreal past)
examples.bangla: যদি আমি বেশি পড়তাম, আমি পাস করতাম।

examples.english: If you heat water to 100°C, it boils. (Type 0 - fact)
examples.bangla: যদি তুমি পানি ১০০°C তে গরম করো, এটি ফুটে।

rules.title: Passive Voice in Spoken English
rules.explanation: Passive Voice তখন ব্যবহার করা হয় যখন কাজটি গুরুত্বপূর্ণ, কাজটি কে করেছে তা গুরুত্বপূর্ণ নয়। বাংলাভাষীরা passive voice এ প্রায়ই ভুল করে।
points: Active: Subject + Verb + Object। যেমন: I write a letter.
Passive: Object + am/is/are/was/were/been + V3 + by Subject। যেমন: A letter is written by me.
Present Indefinite Passive: am/is/are + V3। ❌ It is make → ✅ It is made
Past Indefinite Passive: was/were + V3। ❌ It was make → ✅ It was made
Present Perfect Passive: have/has been + V3। ❌ It has been do → ✅ It has been done
মনে রাখো: Passive সবসময় V3 (Past Participle) ব্যবহার হয়।

examples.english: ❌ The work is do by him. → ✅ The work is done by him.
❌ The book was write by her. → ✅ The book was written by her.
Rice is eaten in Bangladesh. (Passive - fact)
English is spoken all over the world.

rules.title: Common Tense Confusions in Questions
rules.explanation: প্রশ্ন করতে গিয়ে বাংলাভাষীরা প্রায়ই helping verb এবং word order নিয়ে ভুল করে। নিচের নিয়মগুলো মনে রাখো।
points: Yes/No Question: Auxiliary + Subject + Verb + ? ❌ You like tea? → ✅ Do you like tea?
WH Question: Wh + Aux + Subject + Verb + ? ❌ Where you live? → ✅ Where do you live?
কথোপকথনে কখনও কখনও auxiliary বাদ দেওয়া যায় (informal): 'You coming?' কিন্তু formal হলে সবসময় লাগে।
Embedded Question: Word Order পরিবর্তন হয়। ❌ Can you tell me where is the station? → ✅ Can you tell me where the station is?
Indirect Question-এ question mark/auxiliary inversion থাকে না।
Tag Question: ✅ You like tea, don't you? ❌ You like tea, isn't it?

examples.english: ❌ Why you are crying? → ✅ Why are you crying?
❌ What he wants? → ✅ What does he want?
❌ Tell me where is the shop. → ✅ Tell me where the shop is.
❌ He went home, isn't it? → ✅ He went home, didn't he?

quickSummary.formula: Common Mistakes = Wrong Auxiliary + Wrong Verb Form + Wrong Time Expression
keyPoints: কখনই am/is/are + V1 (base form) করবে না — am/is/are দিয়ে V-ing বা Passive ব্যবহার করো
He/She/It-এর সাথে Present Indefinite-এ verb-এর শেষে s/es যোগ হবে
did-এর পর সবসময় base form (V1) — did এর পর V2 হয় না
Since = point (2020, Monday), For = duration (2 years, 3 hours), Ago = past time (2 years ago)
Conditional-এ if-এর পর will হয় না — if + Present Indefinite + will
Passive সবসময় V3 (Past Participle) দিয়ে হয়
Question-এ Auxiliary + Subject + Verb — এই order মনে রাখো
